name: QUALYS, INC.
business: Qualys provides a cloud-based platform delivering information technology (IT), security and compliance solutions. The platform enables customers to identify and manage IT and OT assets, discover and prioritize vulnerabilities, quantify cyber risk, and achieve compliance. Customers include enterprises, government entities, and small and medium-sized businesses across various industries.

exposures.sentence: We are a leading provider of a cloud-based platform delivering information technology (IT), security and compliance solutions.
